title: Supplementary Agreement to the Agreement of 26 July 1957 signed at Luxembourg between the Austrian Federal Republic, of the one part, and the Governments of the Member States of the European Coal and Steel Community and the High Authority of the European Coal and Steel Community , of the other part, Concerning the Establishment of International Railway Through-rates for Consignments of Coal and Steel in transit through the Territory of the Austrian Republic
subject: EUROPEAN COAL AND STEEL COMMUNITY (ECSC)
